ItacPersonItem.Notes: Ferrante Imperato, famous naturalist and apothecary, may have been a member of the Lincei academy in Rome. See C. Preti, Imperato, Ferrante, in Dizionario Biografico Italiano:http://www.treccani.it/biografie/; Enrica Stendardo, Collezionismo e studio della natura a Napoli tra Cinque e Seicento, Napoli, Giannini, 2001.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
